name: Object Render Export
description: Export selected editor objects as a PNG at any resolution, respecting z-order, blending, color channels, opacity, toggle, and pulse state.

export-path.name: Export folder
export-path.description: Where exported PNGs are saved. Defaults to Downloads/Exports on Android, Pictures on Windows (when direct save is enabled).

direct-save.name: Direct save (Windows)
direct-save.description: Save directly to export folder without file picker. Only affects Windows. Android always uses direct save.

enable-logs.name: Enable debug logs
enable-logs.description: Create debug log files for troubleshooting. Logs are saved in the mod's folder. Clear logs via the export popup.
